content:
# Abu-Tartur Phosphate Deposit

**Summary**: A major phosphate deposit in the Western Desert of Egypt.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[1987-abdul-latif|Abdul-Latif, 1987]] focused on the Abu Tartur deposit to evaluate its mineral reserves.

## Geological and Structural Setting

- [[1987-abdul-latif|Abdul-Latif, 1987]] simple structure with local dips of 0.25 to 2 degrees

## Formations Present

- [[1987-abdul-latif|Abdul-Latif, 1987]] Sibaiya Formation, Quseir Formation

## Key Findings From This Location

- The deposit contains the largest phosphate deposits in Egypt within the Sibaiya Formation. ([[1987-abdul-latif|Abdul-Latif, 1987, p. 18]])
